data.title: Bitdeer mined 99.5 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings close to 2,000.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of September 19, its total Bitcoin holdings had increased to 1,966.1 (Note: This number is pure holdings and does not include Bitcoin deposited by customers). In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 99.5 BTC, but 69.0 BTC were sold during the same period.

data.title: Victim Loses $80,462 in Tokens After Signing Malicious EIP-7702
data.description: According to Foresight News, Scam Sniffer has reported that a victim suffered a loss of tokens valued at $80,462. This incident occurred after the individual signed a malicious EIP-7702 batch transaction.

data.title: ECB should cut again in December to hit inflation target, governor Simkus says
data.description:
The ECB needs to lower rates again in December or risk missing its inflation goal, Gediminas Simkus said Friday in Copenhagen. The Lithuanian central bank chief, who sits on the Governing Council, warned that without another cut, price growth could stay stuck below the 2% target. “From a risk-management perspective, it’s better to cut than […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ecb-should-cut-again-in-december-simkus-says/

data.title: Analysis: After ASTER broke through $1.2, KOL and media investors have made a total profit of 84 times
data.description: Crypto influencer AB Kuai.Dong posted on the X platform that Aster had just broken through $1.20. According to previous research, the project's influencer and media investors have seen a total floating profit of 84 times their initial investment. If only the 30% unlocked at the opening is counted, the profit is 25 times. Among them, the highest-ranking influencer, who invested $50,000, has already earned $1.26 million from unlocking funds through ASTER. His current floating profit on his $50,000 investment is $4.2 million, a full 84 times return.

data.title: FTX Will Hand Out $1.6 Billion In Bankruptcy Repayments This Month
data.description:
FTX creditors will receive $1. 6 billion from the now-defunct crypto exchange’s estate as the third wave of payouts takes place on September 30 as part of its ongoing Chapter 11 reorganization process, the FTX Recovery Trust announced Friday. FTX Initiates Third Round Of Payments To Its Creditors Both the exchange’s convenience and non-convenience classes will […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/ftx-will-hand-out-1-6-billion-in-bankruptcy-repayments-this-month/

data.title: Japan’s Koizumi vows new economic plan, targets ¥1M wage boost in 5 years
data.description:
Shinjiro Koizumi, the reform-minded candidate seeking to lead Japan’s ruling party, laid it all out on Saturday in Tokyo that he plans to raise average wages by ¥1 million in five years. That’s $6,760 more in annual pay for workers across the country. Koizumi said the plan would kick off immediately after taking office, and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japans-koizumi-targets-%c2%a51m-wage-boost/

data.title: BitTreasury expands Bitcoin reserves to 1,111 BTC
data.description:
20-9-2025 – BitTreasury has purchased 111 more Bitcoin, increasing its corporate holdings to a total of 1,111 BTC. The addition positions the company at 43rd place among global Bitcoin treasury holders, according to ChainCatcher. Supported by investors including Winklevoss Capital and Nakamoto, BitTreasury’s strategy emphasizes Bitcoin as a core reserve asset, aligning with a broader shift [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/bittreasury-expands-bitcoin-reserves-to-1111-btc/

data.title: Coinbase CEO: Coinbase will be built into a financial super application to replace traditional banks
data.description: In an interview with Fox Business, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong confirmed the company's vision of building Coinbase into a full-service crypto "super app" that replaces traditional banks. The company plans to offer a full suite of financial services, from payments to credit cards and rewards, all powered by crypto. "Yes, we do want to be a super app that offers a wide range of financial services, and I think cryptocurrency has the right to do that," he said.
